mapper.select: SELECT version_id ,version_name ,description ,default_yn ,status_code FROM project_version WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY default_yn DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT version_id, version_name, description, status_code, default_yn FROM project_version WHERE version_id = #{versionId} AND project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT v.VERSION_ID, v.PROJECT_ID, v.VERSION_NAME, v.STATUS_CODE AS VERSION_STATUS, v.DEFAULT_YN,
m.MILESTONE_ID, m.TITLE AS MILESTONE_TITLE, m.STATUS_CODE AS MILESTONE_STATUS, m.START_DATE, m.END_DATE,
i.ISSUE_ID, i.TITLE AS ISSUE_TITLE, i.ISSUE_STATUS_ID, i.START_DATE AS ISSUE_START_DATE, i.DUE_DATE AS ISSUE_DUE_DATE, i.PROGRESS_RATE AS progressRate, g.STATUS_NAME AS issueStatusName FROM PROJECT_VERSION v LEFT JOIN MILESTONE m ON v.VERSION_ID = m.VERSION_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE i ON m.MILESTONE_ID = i.MILESTONE_ID AND i.PROJECT_ID = v.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE_STATUS g ON i.ISSUE_STATUS_ID = g.ISSUE_STATUS_ID WHERE v.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}
UNION ALL
SELECT v.VERSION_ID, v.PROJECT_ID, v.VERSION_NAME, v.STATUS_CODE AS VERSION_STATUS, v.DEFAULT_YN,
'UNASSIGNED_' || v.VERSION_ID AS MILESTONE_ID, '마일스톤 미지정' AS MILESTONE_TITLE, NULL AS MILESTONE_STATUS, NULL AS START_DATE, NULL AS END_DATE,
i.ISSUE_ID, i.TITLE AS ISSUE_TITLE, i.ISSUE_STATUS_ID, i.START_DATE AS ISSUE_START_DATE, i.DUE_DATE AS ISSUE_DUE_DATE, i.PROGRESS_RATE AS progressRate, g.STATUS_NAME AS issueStatusName FROM PROJECT_VERSION v JOIN ISSUE i ON v.VERSION_ID = i.VERSION_ID AND i.MILESTONE_ID IS NULL AND i.PROJECT_ID = v.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE_STATUS g ON i.ISSUE_STATUS_ID = g.ISSUE_STATUS_ID WHERE v.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}
ORDER BY VERSION_ID DESC, START_DATE ASC NULLS LAST, ISSUE_ID ASC
